records.question: Which customers named Selena Gerhold have Life policies that started on or after 2016-07-17 and ended exactly on 2018-01-05?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Life' AND customers.customer_details = 'Selena Gerhold' AND customer_policies.start_date >= '2016-07-17' AND customer_policies.end_date = '2018-01-05'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Customer_ID FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer_Policies AS T2 ON T1.Customer_ID = T2.Customer_ID WHERE T1.Customer_Details LIKE '%Selena Gerhold%' AND T2.Policy_Type_Code = 'Life' AND T2.Start_Date >= '2016-07-17' AND T2.End_Date = '2018-01-05'
